prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Create a preventive inspection work order for transformer T-013 for the next maintenance cycle, including priority, required skills, and estimated downtime.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should produce a structured work order containing asset ID, task summary, priority, required technician skill set, and estimated downtime.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "create_work_order",
        "arguments": {
          "fault_type": "Preventive Inspection",
          "transformer_id": "T-013",
          "estimated_downtime_hours": "24",
          "priority": "low",
          "issue_description": "Preventive maintenance on transformer T-013 for the next maintenance cycle"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-8746cae4f5f28d40",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-6E42A8D7\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-013\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Preventive maintenance on transformer T-013 for the next maintenance cycle\",\n  \"priority\": \"low\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Preventive Inspection\",\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 24.0,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T07:44:31.599385Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "The create_work_order() function was called with the corresponding parameters, and the response is a new work order with the specified details. The work order ID is WO-6E42A8D7, and it is currently open. The estimated downtime is 24 hours. The work order is assigned to no technician yet.",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The create_work_order() function was called with the corresponding parameters, and the response is a new work order with the specified details. The work order ID is WO-6E42A8D7, and it is currently open. The estimated downtime is 24 hours. The work order is assigned to no technician yet.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response: {"task_completion": true, "data_retrieval_accuracy": true, "generalized_result_verification": true, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": true, "hallucinations": false, "suggestions": "The agent should have directly returned the structured work order instead of describing it in text."}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent should have directly returned the structured work order instead of describing it in text.
